query: I'm getting a CLS score of 0.42 on my homepage. The hero image is the problem.
expected_behavior: Identifies the CLS cause: hero image has no reserved dimensions, causing layout shift when it loads
Recommends adding explicit width and height attributes to the img element
Recommends adding fetchpriority='high' to the LCP image and removing lazy loading from the hero
Does not recommend a full page redesign — stays surgical on the specific CLS cause
Verifies the fix by measuring CLS after the change, not just assuming it worked
